meta.title: PRSLOY — VPN without blocks
meta.description: Invite-only VPN. One key — no settings, no server picking. Works with Happ. Crypto only, no KYC.
meta.ogDescription: Invite-only access. One key. No settings.

globe.label: INFRASTRUCTURE
globe.subtitle: Your key is tuned for your network. If a node drops — the exit IP fails over automatically. No reconfiguration.
globe.hint_desktop: DRAG TO ROTATE · HOVER A NODE
globe.hint_touch: DRAG TO ROTATE · TAP A NODE

pricing.label: ONE PRICE.
pricing.guarantee: Crypto only · No KYC · No email

faq.label: QUESTIONS
faq.q1: How does the block bypass work?
faq.a1: Traffic from Russia enters through a whitelisted Russian entry node, then hops to an exit abroad. Your ISP sees a legal Russian IP — not your real destination. That's double-hop.
faq.q2: What if a node goes down?
faq.a2: If the exit becomes unavailable, the route fails over to a backup automatically. No need to reconfigure your key.
faq.a3: Today — the key works in Happ, Hiddify or NekoBox. Our own client is in development. The key doesn't depend on the App Store or Google Play.

pricing_page.label: PRICING
pricing_page.subheadline: One key. One route. No settings.
pricing_page.waitlist_description: We're wiring up Rollypay (cards, crypto, SBP). Drop your email — we'll send a link the moment the gateway is live.
pricing_page.no_spam: No spam. Just the invite link.
pricing_page.success_description: We'll send the payment link the moment the gateway is live. No newsletters.
pricing_page.error_description: Try again in a minute or message us on Telegram.
pricing_page.error_invalid_email: That looks invalid — check and resend.
pricing_page.step_1_body: Click the link from the email. Pay by card, crypto or SBP via Rollypay.
pricing_page.step_2_body: Get a personal key. The route is already tuned for your network.
pricing_page.step_3_body: Open Happ, paste the key, hit connect. Works immediately.

setup_page.label: SETUP
setup_page.title: Connect in 60 seconds
setup_page.subtitle: Three steps. No settings, no server picking. Works in Happ, Hiddify or NekoBox — pick what's comfortable.

steps.title: Install a client
steps.body: Grab Happ from the App Store / Google Play / GitHub. It's an open-source client built for our protocol. Alternatives: Hiddify or NekoBox — the same key works in all of them.

steps.title: Paste the key
steps.body: After payment you get a personal link. Open it on a device with Happ — the client picks up the key automatically. Or copy the link and paste it into Happ via 'Add from clipboard'.

steps.title: Hit connect
steps.body: In Happ, select the profile you just added and tap the connect button. You're online in 1-3 seconds. The route is already tuned — no need to pick servers.

setup_page.troubleshooting_body: Restart Happ. Make sure you're on the latest version. If it still won't work — message us on Telegram with a screenshot of the error, we reply within an hour.

dashboard_page.label: DASHBOARD
dashboard_page.title: Manage your subscription
dashboard_page.subtitle: Right now management lives in the Telegram bot — check key status, renew, regenerate the key, download the config. The web dashboard ships in the next release.
dashboard_page.feature_status_body: Whether your key is active, valid until when, how much traffic is left (if there's a cap).
dashboard_page.feature_renew_body: Pay for a new period without regenerating the key. The route is preserved, devices stay connected.
dashboard_page.feature_regen_body: If the key leaked or broke — issue a new one in one tap. The old one is automatically revoked.
dashboard_page.feature_config_body: Link or QR code for adding it to a new client. All your devices run off the same key.
dashboard_page.feature_support_body: Direct chat with an engineer. Not a bot, not autoresponders — a real person who sees your key and the infrastructure.
dashboard_page.feature_history_body: Payments and renewals list. No traffic telemetry — billing only.
dashboard_page.web_soon_body: Once Rollypay web payment is live we'll add a browser dashboard — same features straight on the site, no Telegram detour.

faq_page.label: FAQ
faq_page.title: What you need to know
faq_page.subtitle: No marketing fluff. Direct answers to what people usually ask.

items.a: An invite-only VPN. You get one key — we've already tuned the route for your network. Paste it into Happ or Hiddify and connect. No server picking, no panel, no fuss.

items.q: Why invite-only and not for everyone?
items.a: Because mass-market VPNs are slow VPNs. The more people on a single node, the faster it gets blocked and the worse the speed. We keep a small base so routes live longer and run faster.

Today — the key works in Happ, Hiddify or NekoBox. Our own client is in development. This is actually a plus: the key doesn't depend on the App Store or Google Play, which periodically pull VPN apps from RU stores.

Russian traffic enters through a Russian entry node that sits on the providers' whitelist. Then it hops to an exit abroad. Your ISP sees a legal Russian IP — your real destination stays two hops away.

items.q: What if a node goes down?
items.a: Watchdogs check nodes regularly. If an exit becomes unavailable, the route fails over to a backup automatically. No need to reconfigure your key.

items.q: What if Russia blocks the entry node?
items.a: We bring up a new entry in a new subnet, the whitelist expands, your keys keep working. That's an ops job, not a user job — there's nothing for you to do.

items.q: How many devices can I use?
items.a: One key works on any number of your devices simultaneously — phone + laptop + tablet + home router. No limit, as long as you're not handing the key to strangers.
We're wiring up the Rollypay gateway — it'll accept SBP, cards and crypto (BTC, ETH, USDT, TON). Until the gateway is live, leave your email — we'll send you a link first.

If the key doesn't work in the first 24 hours after payment — full refund. After that — case by case via Telegram. We don't make complex conditions: if something went wrong, message us and we'll fix it.

items.q: How do I get an invite?
items.a: There's a form on the pricing page — leave your email. When the gateway is live, we'll send a payment link. The key is delivered within minutes after payment.

Only what's needed to issue the key: your Telegram ID (if you register through the bot) or email (if through the site), your key identifier in Marzneshin, the subscription end date. We don't write activity logs (what you open, where you go) — we don't need them.

Honestly — without an independent audit, no VPN deserves 100% trust. What we can say honestly: the key works without logging your traffic, payment goes through an encrypted gateway without forwarding payment data to us, and we have no technical ability to see the contents of your connections.

privacy.label: PRIVACY
privacy.title: What we know about you
privacy.intro: This is not a corporate privacy policy with 40 clauses. Here's an honest list of what we collect, why, and how long we keep it.

sections.p: Only what's needed for the service to work: your Telegram ID (if you register through the bot) OR email (if you leave it on the site form), your key identifier in our provisioning system, subscription start and end date. That's it.

Activity logs (DNS queries, visited sites, peer IPs). Payment data (cards, account numbers) — these go directly to the payment gateway. Biometrics, contacts, geolocation. There are no email newsletters or marketing trackers on the site.

Payments are processed by an external gateway (Rollypay for cards/SBP, direct crypto wallets for BTC/ETH/USDT/TON). We only see the transaction status (success/fail) and amount — not the credentials. Those are kept by the payment provider under their rules.

Your key record lives while the subscription is active + 90 days (in case of renewal). After that — deleted. Email from the waitlist form is kept until we send you the invite link, then deleted within 30 days if you don't subscribe.

Payment gateway (see above). Telegram (if you register through the bot — Telegram sees the fact of interaction with the bot). Hosting (virtual machines and the control panel sit with an infrastructure provider that has no access to your traffic content).

You can request deletion of any of your data — message us on Telegram. After identity verification (via the payment token), we delete within 7 days. You can choose not to give an email — register through the Telegram bot instead.
If we change something — we update the date at the top and post in the Telegram channel. We don't slip in material changes silently.

terms.label: TERMS
terms.title: Rules of use
terms.intro: Short rules. This is not an enterprise SLA — these are beta-service terms written so they can actually be read.

sections.p: One key for connecting to our VPN infrastructure. Validity period — the chosen subscription period (1 / 6 / 12 months). The route is tuned for your network and updates automatically when nodes fail.

sections.h: WHAT YOU CAN USE IT FOR
sections.p: Personal use: bypassing blocks, protecting traffic on public Wi-Fi, accessing content. Sharing the key with people close to you on your devices is fine. Distributing it publicly or reselling it — not allowed.

sections.h: WHAT YOU CAN'T USE IT FOR
sections.p: Spam and DDoS. Attacks on infrastructure (ours or anyone else's). Distributing malware. Automated scraping above reasonable limits (thousands of requests per second). The operator reserves the right to disable the key without refund in case of abuse — but we'll ask first, then disable.

The service is in closed beta. We do everything we can to keep routes up 24/7, but we can't guarantee 100% uptime — that would be a lie. If a node falls, the route switches; if something stays down for a long time, we compensate by extending the subscription.

Payment is upfront for the chosen period. If the key doesn't work in the first 24 hours after payment — full refund. After that — case by case via Telegram. Crypto payments are refunded in the same coin, fiat ones to the original card/account.

You can stop renewing at any time — just don't pay. We can stop servicing the key in case of these terms being violated — after notifying you on Telegram. If we terminate without your fault — we refund the unused portion of the payment.

We provide a technical service. What you do through the VPN is your responsibility. We're not responsible for the content of the sites you reach. A VPN doesn't make you anonymous — it only protects traffic from your provider.
